head.text: Anxious and restless; dull headache. Tongue coated

stomach_abdomen.text: Burning sensation, better cold application. Thirst, better vomiting
Tenderness of liver. Profuse, bilious stool, with nausea. Constipation

fever_chill.text: Thirst, before and during chill and heat; better vomiting as close of chill; sweat no marked

keynotes.text: color="#800000">NYCTANTHES ARBOR TRISTIS Paghala-malli-Sad Tree Bilious and obstinate remittent fever; sciatica; rheumatism. Constipation of children.
